prose:
Fukui reactivity calculation on furan using DFT with B3LYP/def2-TZVP (tier standard, density-fit) in PySCF, gas phase, charge 0, multiplicity 1. The task computed atomic Fukui indices (nucleophilicity f⁺, electrophilicity f⁻, and dual descriptor Δf) via finite-difference response to ±1 electron perturbations (neutral, +1 cation, −1 anion states). All three SCF states converged. Mulliken partial charges were computed for the neutral state. The most electrophilic site is atom 5 (C, 1-based indexing) with f⁺ = 1.9242931; the most nucleophilic is the same atom with f⁻ = 0.1616371. Charge conservation checks passed (sum(f⁺) = 1.0, sum(f⁻) = 1.0). Integrity status trustworthy. A Fukui reactivity visualization plot has been saved. No warnings reported.</prose>
<parameter name="value">1.9242931
